name: GG MILLION$ $25,000 NLH 8-Handed (Event #1)
exclusion_reason: 163-entry re-entry field; only the top 27 in-the-money finishers are published. No full entrant list, so buy-ins for the ~136 non-cashing entries cannot be attributed to named players.
notes: Early May 2024 (exact date unconfirmed). Chris Moneymaker won $903,000, defeating Brian Kim heads-up. Only winner recorded pending full ITM verification.
